title: GateDefinition
description: Reusable typed gate definition entry for explicit workflow/process planning order.

gate.description: Gate contract bound into plan order.

checkpoint_code.description: Explicit checkpoint placement declared by planner.

stage_id.description: Stable logical stage identity for this gate scope.

step_id.description: Stable logical step identity for this gate scope.

role_instance_id.description: Logical role scope identity where the gate executes.

executor_binding_id.description: Reviewed executor binding selected for this gate.

dependency_cache_handoffs.description: Optional broker-mediated dependency cache handoff requirements that must be satisfied before this ordinary workspace gate executes.

request_digest.description: Canonical dependency request digest identity that the broker must resolve for offline handoff.

consumer_role.description: Workspace role kind that must be authorized for this dependency handoff.

required.description: Dependency handoff requirements are fail-closed when present in a plan entry.
